THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT SHAIKEN, LOIS R.N.,D.C. RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT FELLER, LILIA $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $515.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
